title: Grandmother's Farm Part 2
overview: After the mysterious events that occurred to 5 five friends on the farm (in part 1), they decided to go for a new adventure trip set off from Abu Dhabi to Fujairah in an mood of funny situations, but they face more frightening events that turned their journey from joy and fun to fear and horror.
